objectSets.name: First Pass - Upsert Accounts and Channel Programs

objects.query: SELECT Id, Industry, Name, Phone, Type, BillingCity, BillingCountry, BillingState, RLM_Primary_Distributor__r.Name, RLM_Primary_Reseller__r.Name FROM Account WHERE Name IN ('Apex Dynamics', 'Cloud Distributors', 'Robot Resellers') ORDER BY Name ASC
SELECT Category, Description, Id, IsActive, Name FROM ChannelProgram WHERE Name IN ('Distributor Program', 'Reseller Program') ORDER BY Name ASC

SELECT BenefitsInformation, Description, Id, Name, Program.Name, ProgramId, Rank, RLM_Deal_Expiration_Days__c, RLM_Discount_Rate__c, RLM_Minimum_Deal_Size__c, RLM_Adjustment_Type__c, RLM_Adjustment_Value__c FROM ChannelProgramLevel WHERE Program.Name IN ('Distributor Program', 'Reseller Program') ORDER BY Program.Name ASC, Rank ASC

objectSets.name: Second Pass - Enable Partner Accounts and Link Members

objects.query: SELECT Id, IsPartner, Name FROM Account WHERE Name IN ('Cloud Distributors', 'Robot Resellers') ORDER BY Name ASC

SELECT RLM_Adjustment_Type__c, RLM_Adjustment_Value__c, RLM_Discount_Rate__c, Id, Level.Name, LevelId, Name, Partner.Name, PartnerId, Program.Name, ProgramId FROM ChannelProgramMember WHERE Partner.Name IN ('Cloud Distributors', 'Robot Resellers') AND Program.Name IN ('Distributor Program', 'Reseller Program') ORDER BY Program.Name ASC, Partner.Name ASC

SELECT Id, Name, RLM_Primary_Distributor__c, RLM_Primary_Reseller__c, RLM_Primary_Distributor__r.Name, RLM_Primary_Reseller__r.Name FROM Account WHERE Name IN ('Apex Dynamics', 'Cloud Distributors', 'Robot Resellers') ORDER BY Name ASC
